languages.text: "Я не собираюсь предавать тебя врагу Человечества".
"I have no intention of betraying you to an enemy of Humanity."

languages.text: “我不打算把你出卖给人类之敌。”
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of betraying you to an enemy of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: “我不打算把你出卖给人类之敌。”

languages.text: «No tengo intención de entregarle a un enemigo de la Humanidad».
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of betraying you to an enemy of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: «No tengo intención de entregarle a un enemigo de la Humanidad».

languages.text: « Je n'ai nulle intention de vous trahir au profit d'un ennemi de l'humanité. »
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of betraying you to an enemy of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'ai nulle intention de vous trahir au profit d'un ennemi de l'humanité. »

languages.text: "Sana ihanet edip seni İnsanlığın düşmanlarına vermeye niyetim yok."
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of betraying you to an enemy of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Sana ihanet edip seni İnsanlığın düşmanlarına vermeye niyetim yok."

languages.text: "Ich habe nicht vor, Euch an einen Feind der Menschheit zu verraten."
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of betraying you to an enemy of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe nicht vor, Euch an einen Feind der Menschheit zu verraten."

languages.text: 「私は人類の敵にあなたを裏切るつもりはありません」
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of betraying you to an enemy of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: 「私は人類の敵にあなたを裏切るつもりはありません」
